{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact

All users of the `AuthorizeActionFilter` class are affected. The `AuthorizeActionFilter` simply does nothing, no “hacking” is needed to bypass the filter.

### Patches

DotVVM 4.3.15, 4.2.11 and 5.0.0-preview09 fix this.

### Workarounds

As a workaround, you can use the `AuthorizeAttribute` instead. It implements the same interfaces (correctly). Note that is it deprecated for unrelated reasons, feel free to suppress the warning when using it as action filter.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T15:08:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T15:08:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/riganti/dotvvm/security/advisories/GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/riganti/dotvvm/security-advisories/GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/riganti/dotvvm", "summary": "DotVVM: Missing authorization in AuthorizeActionFilter", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T15:08:53Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c8qj-jx8j-fg2w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "DotVVM"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.2.11"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.3.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "DotVVM"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "> 4.3.0-preview01-final, < 4.3.15"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.0.0-preview09-final", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "DotVVM"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0-preview01-final, < 5.0.0-preview09-final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: DotVVM: Missing authorization in AuthorizeActionFilter
